session.user:
Run the following command from the repository root /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report all output:
``` make lint ty ```
Report all output including any errors or success messages.
session.assistant: I'll run the lint and type checking commands from the repository root.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run linting and type checking with make

session.tool_result: uv run ruff check All checks passed! uv run ty check All checks passed!
session.assistant:
Success: Both linting and type checking passed.
**Output Summary:**
``` uv run ruff check All checks passed!
uv run ty check All checks passed! ```
Both tools completed successfully: - **ruff** (linting): All checks passed - **ty** (type checking): All checks passed
